assertions.title: Run transcript terminal style

steps.action: Navigate Dashboard -> Agents -> CEO -> Runs and select run ecffa649
steps.expected: Agent detail run transcript displays mixed line types (reasoning, tool calls, errors)
steps.observed: Transcript displayed mixed content including reasoning text, $-prefixed tool-call lines, and stderr error lines.

steps.expected: Visual evidence of mixed transcript content

steps.action: Run computed-style audit for reasoning/tool/error samples
steps.expected: reasoning=--fg-muted, tool calls=--warn with '$' prefix, errors=--dead
steps.observed: Tool call lines used warn color rgb(232,213,96) with '$' prefix and error lines used dead color rgb(255,96,96), but reasoning sample rendered rgb(255,255,255) instead of muted token rgba(255,255,255,0.68).

evidence.network: Captured request log in gui-detail-polish/round5-detail/VAL-GUI-AGDET-003-network.txt including GET /api/companies/{companyId}/sidebar-badges, GET /api/companies/{companyId}/live-runs, and GET /api/health.

assertions.issues: Fail: reasoning transcript text is not muted; computed color is rgb(255,255,255) instead of --fg-muted.

assertions.title: Brutalist properties panel

steps.action: Navigate to Issues -> WEA-1 issue detail and inspect Properties panel
steps.expected: Properties panel shows key/value metadata with brutalist styling
steps.observed: Properties panel was visible with key/value rows and dropdown controls (Status, Priority, Labels, Assignee, Project).

steps.expected: Visual evidence of key/value panel and controls

steps.action: Run computed-style audit for keys, values, and dropdown border radius
steps.expected: Key text uses --fg-dim at 10px; value text uses --fg at 10px; dropdowns have 0px border radius
steps.observed: Keys are 10px and dim (rgba(255,255,255,0.4)); dropdowns are 0px radius; but value text for Todo/Medium/No labels renders rgba(255,255,255,0.68) instead of --fg (#FFFFFF).

evidence.network: Captured issue-detail request log in gui-detail-polish/round5-detail/VAL-GUI-ISSDET-003-network.txt including GET /api/issues/WEA-1, GET /api/issues/WEA-1/comments, GET /api/issues/WEA-1/runs, and GET /api/health.

assertions.issues: Fail: interactive property values (Todo/Medium/No labels) are not full --fg color; they render muted (rgba(255,255,255,0.68)).

frictions.description: The 'Show properties' button click was intercepted by an overlapping header container in agent-browser pointer-based clicks.
frictions.resolution: Used a DOM-triggered click via agent-browser eval to toggle/confirm properties panel visibility for inspection.

frictions.description: Initial AGDET network export returned no entries in this session.
frictions.resolution: Triggered explicit in-page fetch('/api/health') and re-exported network requests.
